overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a futuristic urban alleyway, ascending a large concrete staircase, exploring an elevated market area with food stalls, and continuing through a sunlit pedestrian street during golden hour. The environment features industrial architecture mixed with neon signage and street vendors.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with construction barriers leading to staircase

events.description: passing pink neon Watson Whore advertisement poster on left wall
beginning to ascend the wide concrete staircase

agents.ego_description: walking along a shaded path lined with palm trees and construction barriers, approaching a large concrete staircase

notable_agents.action: construction worker sitting near the base of the stairs

entered.detail: tropical palm tree in rectangular concrete planter
yellow and black striped temporary construction barriers

tall concrete parking structure with visible levels

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow shaded alley with construction barriers lining the right side and palm trees on the left. The player approaches a wide concrete staircase while passing a distinctive pink neon poster. The environment is industrial with tall buildings blocking most sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep concrete stairwell between industrial structures

events.description: entering the darker stairwell area with bright light visible at the top
approaching the bright sunlight at the top of the staircase
reaching the top of the stairs and entering the covered market walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete staircase toward the light, passing pedestrians going in both directions

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange pants and white top descending the stairs

entered.detail: metal safety railings along the left side of the staircase
covered bridge structure connecting buildings at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The player ascends the steep concrete staircase flanked by metal railings and industrial walls. The lighting transitions from shadow to bright sunlight as they approach the top, where a covered market walkway begins. Other pedestrians are seen using the stairs in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated market walkway with food vendors and industrial infrastructure

events.description: entering the market area with food stalls and neon signage
approaching food vendor counter with steam rising from cooking equipment
turning away from the stall and proceeding down the alley

agents.ego_description: walking through the market walkway, examining food stalls and approaching a vendor behind a counter

notable_agents.action: food vendor working behind the counter with steam rising from cooking equipment

entered.detail: blue and green food service counter with green stools and clown-face signage
hanging digital screens displaying vehicle advertisements
large metal pipes and industrial infrastructure along the wall
large blue cylindrical water storage tanks

segments.scene_description: The player explores an elevated market walkway featuring food stalls with neon signage and industrial elements like large pipes and water tanks. They approach a food vendor working behind a counter with visible steam, then turn to proceed down a connecting alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market alley opening to sunlit pedestrian plaza

events.description: entering the sunlit alleyway with bright golden light streaming in
crowd density increases as approaching the open plaza area
reaching the outdoor seating area with tables and futuristic glowing chairs

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow alley toward the bright sunlight, passing various stalls and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange pants walking ahead toward the sunlight
person sitting at outdoor table with glowing purple chair legs

entered.detail: food stalls with illuminated menu displays lining the right side
storefront signage for Delamain on the left building facade
round metal tables with futuristic stools with glowing legs
bright sunlit open area at the end of the alley

segments.scene_description: The player walks down a narrow alley bathed in golden hour sunlight, passing dumpsters and vendor stalls. The Delamain storefront is visible on the left. The scene opens into a brighter plaza area with outdoor seating where people sit at tables with futuristic glowing chairs, and the crowd density increases.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded industrial alleyway that gradually ascends and opens into a sunlit, bustling urban plaza. It begins in a narrow corridor lined with construction barriers and palm trees, passing a pink neon poster as the camera approaches a wide concrete staircase. As the player climbs the steep stairs, the lighting shifts from deep shadow to bright sunlight, leading directly into an elevated market walkway filled with neon-signed food stalls and steaming vendor counters. The scene then transitions into a narrow alley bathed in golden hour light, passing the Delamain storefront and various street stalls. Finally, the path opens into a bright, crowded plaza where people gather at outdoor tables with futuristic glowing chairs.
